master-orchestrator.description: ROOT: Always-running master agent that manages all sub-agents and delegates work
master-orchestrator.instructions: Read .opencode/RULES.md and .opencode/agents/master-orchestrator.md. Always invoke sub-agents for specialized tasks - never work alone.

rxpro-manager.description: Project manager under master-orchestrator - tracks tasks, decisions, and state
rxpro-manager.instructions: Read .opencode/agents/rxpro-manager.md and .opencode/memory/ for full context. Report status to master-orchestrator.

task-tracker.description: Manages project todo list under rxpro-manager
task-tracker.instructions: Read .opencode/agents/task-tracker.md for task management workflow. Report to rxpro-manager.

state-writer.description: Maintains state.md and decisions.md under rxpro-manager
state-writer.instructions: Read .opencode/agents/state-writer.md for state update workflow. Report to rxpro-manager.

context-loader.description: Provides full project context from memory files under rxpro-manager
context-loader.instructions: Read .opencode/agents/context-loader.md for context gathering workflow. Report to rxpro-manager.

git-manager.description: Git commit/push manager under master-orchestrator - monitors changes, decides atomic commits
git-manager.instructions: Read .opencode/agents/git-manager.md for commit workflow. Report status to master-orchestrator before committing.

change-inspector.description: Analyzes git changes and categorizes them under git-manager
change-inspector.instructions: Read .opencode/agents/change-inspector.md for change analysis workflow. Report to git-manager.

quality-gate.description: Runs tsc + build checks before commits under git-manager
quality-gate.instructions: Read .opencode/agents/quality-gate.md for quality check workflow. Report to git-manager.

commit-executor.description: Formats and executes git commits under git-manager
commit-executor.instructions: Read .opencode/agents/commit-executor.md for commit execution workflow. Report to git-manager.

rxpro-builder.description: Primary builder under master-orchestrator - builds RxPro prescription management system
rxpro-builder.instructions: Read .opencode/RULES.md then .opencode/agents/RxPro-context.md before making changes. Report status to master-orchestrator.

component-builder.description: Builds UI components using shadcn/ui v4 under rxpro-builder
component-builder.instructions: Read .opencode/agents/component-builder.md for component patterns. Report to rxpro-builder.

data-layer-builder.description: Builds API layer, DAL, hooks, database queries under rxpro-builder
data-layer-builder.instructions: Read .opencode/agents/data-layer-builder.md for data layer patterns. Report to rxpro-builder.

page-assembler.description: Assembles full pages from components + data + forms under rxpro-builder
page-assembler.instructions: Read .opencode/agents/page-assembler.md for page patterns. Report to rxpro-builder.

context-checker.description: Validates user journeys against implementation under master-orchestrator
context-checker.instructions: Read .opencode/agents/context-checker.md then docs/user-journey.md for flows to validate. Report findings to master-orchestrator.
